payload.answer: SQL admin execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. The request '/brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards' was not run. No results are available.
citations: Input command: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards

entity_resolution.reason: No durable user memory should be created from an admin SQL/debug request.

details: Blocked admin SQL request due to disabled debug SQL flag.

repair_options: Set BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true in the appropriate debug environment, then retry the command.
Use a non-SQL admin/debug interface if one is available.
Inspect application logs or configured diagnostics for why SQL debug access is disabled.
